education.label: Education
education.title: What is Answer Engine Optimization?
education.description: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) is the practice of optimizing website content to be selected, cited, and surfaced by AI-powered answer engines. Unlike traditional SEO that targets search engine result pages, AEO focuses on making your content the preferred source that large language models like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google Gemini reference when generating answers.
education.descriptionBold: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) is the practice of optimizing website content to be selected, cited, and surfaced by AI-powered answer engines.
education.descriptionRest: Unlike traditional SEO that targets search engine result pages, AEO focuses on making your content the preferred source that large language models like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google Gemini reference when generating answers.

phases.sectionSubtitle: 7 phases that take you from invisible to cited. Each phase builds on the last — here’s what to expect.
phases.footer: The 99-point checklist guides you through every task in every phase.
phases.footerSuffix: guides you through every task in every phase.

0.title: Foundation & Audit
0.description: Audit existing content and technical infrastructure. Map questions, analyze competitors, and establish your AEO baseline.
0.visibility: Know where you stand — baseline metrics and content gaps identified

1.title: Structured Data & Schema
1.description: Implement FAQ, HowTo, Article, Product, and Organization schema markup to make your content machine-readable.
1.visibility: AI engines can now read and understand your content structure

2.title: Content Optimization
2.description: Restructure content with answer paragraphs, heading hierarchy, comparison tables, and topic clusters.
2.visibility: Your content becomes the best possible answer for AI queries

3.title: Technical AEO
3.description: Configure AI bot access, semantic HTML, RSS feeds, internal linking, and meta optimization.
3.visibility: AI crawlers can access and extract your content efficiently

4.title: Authority & Trust
4.description: Build E-E-A-T signals, authority backlinks, Google Business Profile, and citation networks.
4.visibility: AI engines trust your content as a credible, authoritative source

5.title: Testing & Validation
5.description: Test across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI, and Bing Copilot. Validate schema and crawlability.
5.visibility: Verify you appear across all major AI platforms

6.title: Monitor & Iterate
6.description: Track AI citations, A/B test answer formats, benchmark competitors, and re-optimize monthly.
6.visibility: Continuous improvement — stay visible as AI engines evolve weekly

0.question: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)?
0.answer: Answer Engine Optimization is the practice of optimizing website content to be cited by AI-powered answer engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Bing Copilot. Unlike traditional SEO which targets search rankings, AEO focuses on structured data, direct answer formatting, and entity authority to ensure AI systems reference your content.

1.question: How is AEO different from traditional SEO?
1.answer: While SEO optimizes for search engine rankings and click-through rates, AEO optimizes for AI citation and inclusion in generated answers. AEO emphasizes schema markup, concise answer formatting, entity clarity, and E-E-A-T signals that help large language models identify and cite authoritative sources.

2.question: Who is AEO Dashboard built for?
2.answer: AEO Dashboard is built for agencies, SEO professionals, and digital marketers who want to future-proof their clients' online visibility. Whether you manage one website or hundreds, the platform scales with you.

3.question: When will AEO Dashboard launch?
3.answer: We're currently in the final stages of development. Join the waitlist to be notified the moment we launch. We'll also be selecting a small group of early access users to try the platform before the public release.

4.question: What features does AEO Dashboard include?
4.answer: AEO Dashboard includes a 99-point AEO checklist organized across 7 phases, a real-time site analyzer that scores any URL instantly, a multi-engine testing lab to check your visibility across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini, an AI content writer, a schema markup generator, and monitoring with alerts for citation changes.

5.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use AEO Dashboard?
5.answer: No. AEO Dashboard is designed for marketers and SEO professionals of all skill levels. The checklist guides you step-by-step, the schema generator requires no coding, and every task includes documentation explaining what to do and why it matters.

6.question: How does the 99-Point AEO Checklist work?
6.answer: The checklist breaks AEO into 7 phases — from auditing your current state to ongoing monitoring. Each phase contains specific tasks with documentation, priority levels, and progress tracking. You work through it sequentially, and the dashboard shows your completion percentage and overall AEO readiness score.

7.question: What AI engines does AEO Dashboard support?
7.answer: AEO Dashboard helps you optimize for all major AI answer engines including ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Google Gemini, Perplexity, Bing Copilot, and Claude. The testing lab lets you query all of them simultaneously to see how your content appears.

8.question: Is AEO Dashboard free?
8.answer: During the early access period, selected users will get full platform access at no cost. After launch, there will be both free and paid tiers. The core site analyzer and basic checklist will always be free. Join the waitlist to lock in early access benefits.

9.question: Can I use AEO Dashboard for multiple websites?
9.answer: Yes. AEO Dashboard supports multiple projects, so you can manage AEO for several websites from a single account. Each project gets its own checklist progress, analyzer results, and monitoring data — ideal for agencies managing client portfolios.

results.title: Your AEO Readiness Score
results.ctaTitle: AEO Dashboard fixes all of this — automatically.

invisible.label: AI Invisible
invisible.desc: Your website is essentially invisible to AI engines. Without structured data, direct answers, or AI crawler access, AI systems have no way to discover or cite your content. The good news: there's a clear path to fix this.

starting.label: Getting Started
starting.desc: Your website has some basics in place, but significant gaps remain in how AI engines find and cite your content. Closing these gaps could dramatically increase your AI visibility within weeks.

onTrack.label: On Track
onTrack.desc: Good foundation! Your site has many AEO elements in place. A few targeted improvements in your weakest areas could push you into the top tier of AI-ready websites.

aiReady.label: AI Ready
aiReady.desc: Excellent! Your website is well-optimized for AI search engines. You're ahead of 95% of websites. Keep monitoring and iterating to maintain your competitive edge.

add_faq_sections.title: Add FAQ sections to key pages
add_faq_sections.desc: AI engines heavily rely on Q&A formatted content to generate direct answers. Adding FAQ sections is the single fastest way to get cited.

increase_publish_frequency.title: Increase content publishing frequency
increase_publish_frequency.desc: Fresh, regularly updated content signals to AI engines that your site is an active, authoritative source worth citing.

write_direct_answers.title: Write content that directly answers AI queries
write_direct_answers.desc: Structure your content as clear, concise answers to common questions in your industry. AI engines prefer direct answer formatting.

add_schema_markup.title: Add JSON-LD schema markup
add_schema_markup.desc: You're missing the #1 technical signal AI engines use to understand your content. Schema markup is essential for AI visibility.

check_ai_crawlers.title: Check AI crawler access in robots.txt
check_ai_crawlers.desc: If GPTBot, PerplexityBot, and other AI crawlers are blocked, your content can never appear in AI-generated answers.

add_sitemap_lastmod.title: Add an XML sitemap with lastmod dates
add_sitemap_lastmod.desc: A proper sitemap with accurate lastmod dates helps AI engines know which content to prioritize and re-index.

test_ai_citations.title: Start testing AI citations
test_ai_citations.desc: You can't improve what you don't measure. Check how your brand appears in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini.

track_ai_overviews.title: Monitor Google AI Overviews
track_ai_overviews.desc: AI Overviews are replacing traditional search results for many queries. Track which of your pages appear there.

setup_ai_traffic_tracking.title: Set up AI traffic tracking
setup_ai_traffic_tracking.desc: Most analytics tools don't separate AI-driven traffic. Setting up proper tracking reveals the true impact of AI search.

monitor_competitors_ai.title: Monitor competitors in AI search
monitor_competitors_ai.desc: Knowing which competitors AI engines cite helps you identify gaps in your own content and strategy.

create_aeo_strategy.title: Create a dedicated AEO strategy
create_aeo_strategy.desc: AEO requires different tactics than traditional SEO. A dedicated strategy ensures you're optimizing for how AI actually selects sources.
